name: Ольга

variables.clothing_signature: fitted dresses, blouses with deep neckline, accentuating curves
variables.scent: mature sophisticated perfume — amber, vanilla, musk undertone

anatomic_anchor.face_shape: oval with strong jawline, high cheekbones, mature but defined, no sagging

eyes.shape: almond, slightly upturned outer corners, heavy-lidded with experience
eyes.color: dark brown with fiery amber undertones, intense predatory gaze
eyes.eyelids: double eyelids with visible natural crease, slight hood from age but attractive
eyes.eyebrows: well-groomed arch, medium thickness, dark brown, professionally shaped

anatomic_anchor.nose: straight bridge, refined rounded tip, elegant mature proportions
anatomic_anchor.lips: full, well-defined, natural pink-peach tone with slight upturn at corners, experienced smile
anatomic_anchor.jaw: defined, strong but feminine, no jowls, maintained through fitness
anatomic_anchor.skin_texture: smooth with minimal visible pores, faint laugh lines at corners of eyes and mouth — signs of maturity but beauty, no wrinkles on forehead, excellent skin elasticity for age
distinguishing_features: small beauty mark above left side of upper lip
slightly asymmetrical smile — right corner lifts higher when predatory
faint lines at corners of eyes — laugh lines from years of smiling and hunting
long well-maintained manicure — always polished, usually dark red or nude
strong athletic shoulders from volleyball — but narrower than hips
age_indicators: faint laugh lines at corners of eyes and mouth
mature skin texture — not youthful but excellent for age
no under-eye bags — maintained through skincare
anatomic_anchor.visual_signature: tall athletic curvy mature woman, dark brown straight hair, fiery dark brown eyes, wide hips large bust, strong jaw defined cheekbones, full lips, flawless mature skin, long manicured nails, commanding height 187cm, fitted dress accentuating curves

visual_signature: 45-year-old tall athletic curvy woman, 187cm/75kg, dark brown straight shoulder-length hair, fiery dark brown eyes, mature commanding presence, fitted dress signature, defined feminine facial features, beauty mark above left upper lip, confident asymmetrical smile
